titleStmt.title: SII 40.20: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 20. (A.R. No. B. 540 of 1929.) Jeṭṭipālem, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the compound of the temple of Hanumān in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1537, Ānanda, Margaśira śu. 7, corresponding to 1614 A.D., November 27, Sunday.

Records the construction of a platform (Vēdi) for the god Hanumanta of the village of Jeṭṭipālem by Veṅkaṭa Bhaṭlaṁgāru, son of Ayilambhaṭlu and grandson of Vaḍlamāni-Vīraṁbhaṭlaṁgāru for the merit of his parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbbulu 1537 Agu
nēṭi Ānaṁda saṁvvatsara mārggasira
śuddha 7 lu yajana yājana Adhyena Adhyā
paka dānadānapratigrahaṣalkurnu nira
tulaina vaḍḍamāni vīraṁbhaṭlaṁgāri pau
tṛṁḍaina AIlaṁbhaṭlaṁgāri putṛṁḍaina
veṁkaṭabhaṭlaṁgāru jeṭṭipālepu grāmā
nana tama taṁḍri Ayalaṁbhaṭlaṁgārikiṁ
ni tama talli timmakaṁgārikiṁnni puṇyamu
gānu hanumaṁtta nivēdiṁni veyiṁcci
ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāIgānu pratiṣṭha śē
yiṁccenū śrīśrī jēyunu
Digital edition of SII 40.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
